name: Seafood Chilaquiles Casserole
recipeIngredient: 6-7 inch Flour or Corn Tortillas, 10 each
1/2 cup Green Onions with tops, sliced
1 Chipotle Chile in adobo sauce, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tortillas into 1/2-inch strips.
2. Finely chop chipotle chile in adobo sauce.
3. Crisply cook bacon and crumble it.
